title: Kobe Bryant
html:
Kobe Bryant

Stub. NBA Hall-of-Famer (1996–2016 Lakers) who died Jan-26-2020. Yahir collected/cataloged Kobe trading cards through 2020 (2020 09 01 kobe card collection — seven cards by year/set/serial), suggesting active engagement during the post-death price-spike era. Likely mamba-mentality mentor-from-afar in later notes.
